Install on iPhone / iPad

Apple doesn't allow direct app downloads from websites, but you can add RD Dairy to your home screen in 3 quick steps (use Safari):

  1. Tap the Share button ↑ at the bottom of Safari.
  2. Scroll down and tap "Add to Home Screen".
  3. Tap Add — the RD Dairy app icon appears on your home screen.

Our Story

A Simple Promise of Purity

RD Dairy was founded to provide pure, natural milk directly from our farms to families in Chennai. Our focus is consistent quality, freshness, and trust with every order.

We believe every family deserves milk the way nature intended - untouched, unprocessed, and nourishing.

GoA2 Dairy & RD Dairy - One FamilyBoth brands founded by Rangadurai share the same farms, sourcing networks, and quality standards - ensuring fresh, natural dairy every single day. "We run Sri Ranga Gaushala with love and responsibility, providing our cows a safe, caring environment where their well-being always comes first."
Native Breed CowsGir, Red Sindhi & Sahiwal
Farm-to-HomeMinimal handling chain
No Mass ProductionQuality over quantity
Chennai Based15+ years of trust
 Chat With Us

Why Families Choose RD Dairy

Five reasons Chennai families trust us every single day.

01

Native Breed Sourcing

Gir, Red Sindhi, Sahiwal - superior A2 Beta-Casein protein.

02

Farm-to-Home Model

Minimal handling between farm and door - maximum freshness.

03

Consistent Quality

Same taste, same quality, every single day without exception.

04

Flexible Subscription

Easy to start, pause, or modify at any time.

05

Direct Support

Orders handled personally through WhatsApp - real people, real responses.

FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

What should I do with the empty glass bottles?

Please rinse the empty bottles and keep them ready. Our delivery partner will collect them during your next delivery.

Can I visit the farm?

Yes! Please call us in advance so we can schedule a convenient time.

Can I pause my subscription?

Absolutely. Call or WhatsApp us at +91 90805 02101 and we will pause it right away.

By when should I request a pause?

Kindly inform us by 8:30 PM the day before your delivery to ensure the pause is processed in time.

How can I make payments?

You can pay via cash, bank transfer, or UPI online payment. Monthly billing at the start of each month.

Are there any delivery charges?

No, delivery is completely free across all our delivery areas in Chennai.
